app.title: Relationship Values Check-In
app.description1: Identify the values that matter most in your relationship and explore how well your daily actions align with them.
app.chooseTitle: Choose Values That Feel Important to You
app.chooseDesc: Select any values that resonate with you. There is no right or wrong choice.
app.reflectDesc: Choose one of the values you selected and think about how it appears in your daily life.
app.reflectQuestion: How does this value show up in your life?
app.reflectPlaceholder: I try to spend quality time with my parents every weekend.
app.liveDesc: Small actions help bring our values into everyday life.
app.liveQuestion: What is one small thing you can do this week to live this value?
app.livePlaceholder: Plan dinner with my family this weekend.
app.historyDesc: Your previous reflections are saved here so you can revisit them anytime.
app.noHistory: You haven't completed a values reflection yet.

common.completion_message: You've successfully completed this activity. Take a moment to appreciate your progress.
common.share_text: I have done this {{activityName}} in TherapyMantra and really enjoy it you can do it too just follow the link to android app {{androidUrl}} or ios app {{iosUrl}}
common.instruction_ready: Set your rounds and tap play to begin
common.instruction_running: Follow the circle to regulate your breath

instruction_running: Follow the circle to regulate your breath
